intervals.name: Warmup

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 40% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2/8. Target 130% for 1:00. Next rest: 1:00.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 40% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 40% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 40% done. 130% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 55%, 85-95 rpm. This is how.

coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 12 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 47% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 1min 0s recovery before next effort.

coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 1:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 54% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 16 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 45-55% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 57% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're 61% through this session. The deep work happens now, when you're tired.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 61% complete. 130% for 1:00. Fatigue is real — maintain 90-100 rpm, don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Deep into it: 61% done. This is where you separate from your past self. Dig deeper.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 8/11. Only 3 more of these. 'Only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 8/11. You've accumulated 5min of hard work. Quality over quantity from here.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 64% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 64% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 64% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 64% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 9 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Deep into it now. 19 minutes of work behind you. Finish what you started.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 9/11. 2 to go. You've accumulated 6min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've done 6 minutes of hard work. You can do 2 more intervals. Believe it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 2 reps to go. Your body is writing a strongly worded letter. You won't read it until after cooldown.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 2 intervals left. 8 total minutes. Your lungs are burning. That's adaptation.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 71% done. 0 intervals left. 7 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 20 minutes of work done. 7 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 20 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 71% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 11/11. Everything you have left. Leave nothing for the cooldown.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 10/11. 1:00 at 130%. Cadence: 90-100 rpm. Seated. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 1 reps left. 6 minutes total. Your competition quit 20 minutes ago. You're still here.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Deep into it. Your lungs will remember this moment. So will your neighbors from the screaming.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Deep work. 130% for 1:00. Then 1:00 rest. Suffer productively.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 78% done. 0 intervals left. 5 minutes total. Don't quit now.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 78% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 78% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% for 1:00. Finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First interval at 130%. Set the tone. Your body remembers the last time you quit early.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 1:00 at 130%. Then 4min cooldown. Empty the tank correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This one is harder than the last. That's exactly how it should be. You're adapting. You're improving.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final rep. Your FTP is filing for protective custody. Ignore it. 1:00 and done.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 120-130% FTP, 90-100 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery
